intent: Pursue an objective across many work episodes without supervision: each episode does bounded work, checkpoints its state, and emits a heartbeat; interruption at any point resumes from the last checkpoint; stalls and budget exhaustion escalate instead of spinning.

state.objective: string — carried verbatim across all episodes
state.checkpoint: object — { progress_summary, artifacts, decisions_made, next_intent, episode }

nodes.role_ref: bound per instantiation to the acting profile

edges.when: fresh start, or resume: worker begins from checkpoint.next_intent
episode's bounded work complete (or context-handoff fired mid-episode)
progress made && objective unmet && budget remains
stall_counter >= 3 OR budget exhausted — outcome: escalated, with checkpoint attached

termination: objective met, or escalation on stall (3 episodes without progress) or budget exhaustion — escalation always carries the latest checkpoint so a human resumes informed, not from zero
